blended.narrative: Mount Washington is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,666 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
